message:
fix: harden extension safety limits and error diagnostics

Three targeted fixes improving robustness:

1. extensions_js.rs: Reduce array length limit from 10,000,000 to
   100,000 elements. The previous limit was dangerously permissive
   and could cause OOM on large payloads. Error message now shows
   the actual length vs the limit for easier debugging.

2. extension_replay.rs: Replace three bare panic!() calls with
   unreachable!() that include the unexpected value in the message.
   These match arms in test helpers should never be reached, and
   if they are, the error now shows what was actually received
   (e.g., "expected ContentDelta, got: {other:?}").

3. session_sqlite.rs: Handle empty session names gracefully. Adds
   has_name_key tracking so we distinguish between "name key absent"
   and "name key present but empty string". Only sets the session
   name if the value is non-empty, preventing blank session names
   from overwriting meaningful ones.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
